title: Goblin Slayer
description:
In a fantasy world filled with adventurers, monsters, and dangerous quests, a mysterious silver-ranked warrior known only as Goblin Slayer dedicates his entire life to exterminating goblins. While many adventurers underestimate goblins as weak creatures, Goblin Slayer understands the terrifying destruction they can cause after witnessing tragedy in his past. Armed with experience, strategy, and relentless determination, he takes on brutal missions that others refuse to accept.

After rescuing a young Priestess from a deadly goblin attack, Goblin Slayer begins traveling with new companions who slowly learn about his painful past and obsession with revenge. As the group faces increasingly dangerous enemies and difficult battles, they discover that survival in their world requires courage, teamwork, and sacrifice. Combining dark fantasy, intense combat, and emotional moments, Goblin Slayer tells a harsh story about trauma, survival, and the fight against evil.
